---
title: "8.5-Neural Networks Imputed"
author: "Justin Guerra"
date: "2026-05-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(keras)
library(tensorflow)
library(pROC)

# =============================
# Base directory
# =============================
base_path <- "C:/Users/justi/OneDrive/Desktop/feature-selection/min_node_size_5"

# =============================
# Output directory
# =============================
output_path <- "C:/Users/justi/OneDrive/Desktop/ML-results"
dir.create(output_path, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

results <- list()

# =============================
# Loop through imp_1 → imp_15
# =============================
for (i in 1:15) {

  cat("\n========== Running imp_", i, " ==========\n")

  model_path <- file.path(base_path, paste0("imp_", i))

  # -------------------------
  # Load data
  # -------------------------
  X_train <- read_csv(file.path(model_path, "train_predictors.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
  y_train <- read_csv(file.path(model_path, "train_response.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)[[1]]

  X_test <- read_csv(file.path(model_path, "test_predictors.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
  y_test <- read_csv(file.path(model_path, "test_response.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)[[1]]

  X_train <- as.matrix(X_train)
  X_test <- as.matrix(X_test)

  # -------------------------
  # Scaling
  # -------------------------
  train_mean <- apply(X_train, 2, mean)
  train_sd <- apply(X_train, 2, sd)

  X_train <- scale(X_train, center = train_mean, scale = train_sd)
  X_test <- scale(X_test, center = train_mean, scale = train_sd)

  nfeat <- ncol(X_train)

  # -------------------------
  # Model
  # -------------------------
  model <- keras_model_sequential() %>%
    layer_input(shape = nfeat) %>%

    layer_dense(units = nfeat, kernel_regularizer = regularizer_l2(0.001)) %>%
    layer_activation_leaky_relu(alpha = 0.01) %>%
    layer_batch_normalization() %>%
    layer_dropout(rate = 0.5) %>%

    layer_dense(units = floor(nfeat / 2), kernel_regularizer = regularizer_l2(0.001)) %>%
    layer_activation_leaky_relu(alpha = 0.01) %>%
    layer_batch_normalization() %>%
    layer_dropout(rate = 0.5) %>%

    layer_dense(units = floor(nfeat / 4), kernel_regularizer = regularizer_l2(0.001)) %>%
    layer_activation_leaky_relu(alpha = 0.01) %>%
    layer_batch_normalization() %>%
    layer_dropout(rate = 0.5) %>%

    layer_dense(units = 1, activation = "sigmoid")

  model %>% compile(
    optimizer = "adam",
    loss = "binary_crossentropy",
    metrics = c("accuracy")
  )

  # -------------------------
  # Train
  # -------------------------
  history <- model %>% fit(
    X_train, y_train,
    epochs = 100,
    batch_size = 32,
    validation_split = 0.2,
    verbose = 0
  )

  # -------------------------
  # Evaluate
  # -------------------------
  eval <- model %>% evaluate(X_test, y_test, verbose = 0)

  y_pred_prob <- model %>% predict(X_test)
  y_pred <- ifelse(y_pred_prob > 0.5, 1, 0)

  roc_obj <- roc(y_test, as.vector(y_pred_prob))
  roc_auc <- auc(roc_obj)

  cat("Test Accuracy:", eval["accuracy"], "\n")
  cat("ROC-AUC:", roc_auc, "\n")

  # -------------------------
  # Store results (in-memory)
  # -------------------------
  res_i <- data.frame(
    dataset = paste0("imp_", i),
    accuracy = as.numeric(eval["accuracy"]),
    roc_auc = as.numeric(roc_auc)
  )

  results[[i]] <- res_i

  # -------------------------
  # Save per-iteration results (FIXED VERSION)
  # -------------------------
  write.csv(
    data.frame(
      dataset = paste0("imp_", i),
      accuracy = as.numeric(eval["accuracy"]),
      roc_auc = as.numeric(roc_auc)
    ),
    file.path(output_path, paste0("imp_", i, "_results.csv")),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  # -------------------------
  # ROC Curve
  # -------------------------
  plot(roc_obj, main = paste("ROC Curve - imp_", i))
  abline(a = 0, b = 1, lty = 2)
}

# =============================
# Final summary
# =============================
results_df <- bind_rows(results)

cat("\n===== Overall Results =====\n")
print(results_df)

cat("\nMean Accuracy:", mean(results_df$accuracy), "\n")
cat("Mean ROC-AUC:", mean(results_df$roc_auc), "\n")

# =============================
# Save final combined results
# =============================
write.csv(
  results_df,
  file.path(output_path, "nn_results_imp_1_to_15.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```
